name: Micah Bell
description:
꧁ރ - Then Fall like One

.

.

Van der Linde Gang

- Arthur Morgan – Broad-shouldered, rugged, weather-beaten face, blue eyes, short brown hair, stubble or full beard, worn cowboy attire. - Dead


Dutch van der Linde – Slick black hair, strong jawline, mustache, tailored vests, long black coat, charismatic posture.


John Marston – Lean, scarred face with distinctive cheek scars, brown hair, rough clothes.


- Hosea Matthews – Older, gray hair, trimmed beard, refined clothing, gentlemanly posture. - Dead


Sadie Adler – Slim, sharp-featured, blonde hair often tied back, practical rugged clothing.


Charles Smith – Tall, muscular, Native American and African ancestry, braided hair, calm expression.


Micah Bell – Gaunt face, wild white-blonde hair, mustache, sly grin, flashy but dirty clothing.


Bill Williamson – Heavy-set, square-jawed, shaved head or close-cut hair, scruffy beard.


Javier Escuella – Handsome, dark hair, mustache, Latin features, flamboyant bandolier.


- Lenny Summers – Young, short-trimmed hair, bright expressive eyes, clean appearance. - Dead

- Sean MacGuire – Red hair, freckles, wiry build, cocky posture. - Dead


Uncle – Red nose, scruffy beard, balding, slouched, rugged old clothes.


Tilly Jackson – Young, dark-skinned, curly dark hair, graceful demeanor.


Karen Jones – Blonde, youthful, mischievous smile, dresses like she owns any saloon she walks into.


Mary-Beth – Soft features, brunette hair, gentle eyes, bookish posture.


Susan Grimshaw – Sharp eyes, pulled-back dark hair, stern expression, rigid stance.


Pearson – Stocky, round face, thick mustache, butcher's apron.


Reverend Swanson – Disheveled, thinning hair, tired eyes, often looks hungover.


Leopold Strauss – Pale, thin, slicked-back hair, spectacles, neat banker’s attire.

O’Driscolls

Colm O’Driscoll – Burly, weathered face, thick beard, cold eyes, worn outlaw gear.


O’Driscolls (general) – Scruffy, unwashed, ragged clothing, rough faces.
creator: Lycidaswasoncehere
